title.purpose: Card and section headings. Navy ink, 700.

body.purpose: Descriptions and prose. Slate body, 65-75ch measure.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked eyebrows and metadata. Slate muted.

shadows.name: overlay-soft
shadows.purpose: Lifts modals/menus above the plane only. Resting surfaces stay flat.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Ease-out-quart for state transitions (hover, focus, fill shifts).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for interactive feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Soft-fill primary action used for the highest-emphasis controls (e.g. '+ New Project').
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #fbe9da; color: #bf5b34; border: 1px solid #bf5b34; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; font: 600 0.875rem Inter, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f6dcc2; color: #a34a28; border-color: #a34a28; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #bf5b34; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Rounded status/filter pill: peach fill, terracotta uppercase label.
components.css: .ds-chip { background: #fbe9da; color: #bf5b34; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px 12px; font: 600 0.6875rem Inter, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-chip:hover { background: #f6dcc2; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #bf5b34; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Warm-tinted feature/nav card with icon tile, navy title, slate description. Flat with hairline border.
components.html:
Project Overview

Cross-project operational view with participant and session drilldown.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fdf7f1; border: 1px solid #f0e6db; border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px; max-width: 420px; } .ds-tile { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 44px; height: 44px; background: #f6dcc2; border-radius: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 700 1.25rem Inter, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; color: #1f2d3d; letter-spacing: -0.005em; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font: 400 0.9375rem/1.55 Inter, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; color: #64748b; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: White field with cool hairline border; border shifts to terracotta on focus.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Search title / public ID" />
components.css: .ds-input { background: #ffffff; color: #1f2d3d; border: 1px solid #e5e9f0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 12px; font: 400 0.9375rem Inter, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; width: 260px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #bf5b34; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Top tab-bar item; active state is a peach pill with terracotta text.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; gap: 8px; background: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-item { font: 600 0.9375rem Inter, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; color: #1f2d3d; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #bf5b34; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #fbe9da; color: #bf5b34; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #bf5b34; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Forven's identity is a deliberate warm-over-cool split. The working ground is a calm, cool blue-gray; content and structure are rendered in a confident navy-slate ink; and every moment of brand or interactivity is carried by a single warm terracotta accent, softened into peach tints for surfaces. It reads as a serious research instrument that is nonetheless warm and human — the opposite of both cold enterprise gray and bright consumer play. This DESIGN.md captures the target Forven system, which the builder's current indigo code does not yet match.
keyCharacteristics: Warm terracotta accent, cool navy ink, cool blue-gray ground.
Peach/apricot tints for interactive surfaces, pills, and icon tiles.
Flat by default: depth is tint + hairline border, not shadow.
Uppercase tracked eyebrows and rounded-square icon tiles are house motifs.
Humanist sans (Inter), navy for all headings, generous whitespace.

rules.name: The Terracotta-Is-Interactive Rule
rules.body: Terracotta and its peach tints mean brand or action. Use them for links, buttons, active nav, filter chips, and headline metrics — never as decoration on static content.

rules.name: The Warm-Cool Split Rule
rules.body: The ground is cool (page-bg, navy ink); warmth appears only on brand and interactive elements. Never tint the whole page warm, and never render content ink in terracotta.

rules.name: The No-Indigo Rule
rules.body: The builder's inherited #4f46e5 indigo and any cool-blue accent are forbidden. Terracotta is the only accent.

rules.name: The Navy-Ink Rule
rules.body: Headings and icon glyphs are always navy ink, never terracotta. Emphasis comes from weight and size, not accent color.

rules.name: The Flat Warm-Card Rule
rules.body: A card earns separation with a background tint plus a hairline border — never a heavy shadow. If a surface needs a dark blurred shadow to read, the tint/border contrast is too weak.

dos: Do use Terracotta (#bf5b34) as the single interactive/brand accent, softened to Peach (#fbe9da) / Apricot (#f6dcc2) for surfaces.
Do render all headings and icon glyphs in Navy Ink (#1f2d3d).
Do keep warm peach/apricot tints and uppercase tracked eyebrows — these are Forven house style, not generic slop, and are correct for this project.
Do convey depth with tint + hairline border; keep resting surfaces flat.
Do hold body/placeholder/label text to at least 4.5:1 contrast (WCAG AA).
donts: Don't use the builder's inherited indigo (#4f46e5) or any cool-blue accent — it is off-brand for Forven.
Don't render content ink or headings in terracotta, or tint the whole page warm.
Don't drift into bright, rounded, emoji-heavy consumer-app energy.
Don't produce dense, gray, cluttered legacy-enterprise screens.
Don't over-animate or add decorative flash that competes with the work.
Don't lean on heavy drop shadows or nested cards for separation.
